title: Betterpack
description:
This is a build for a leisurely game.
This build may be slightly inferior in performance to other builds, but that's because of visual mods.
body:
# This mod pack is assembled for a light and leisurely game.

Features:
- Falling leaves.
- There is an animation of the appearance of chunks.
- Cherished Worlds and other.
- This build uses some popular mods to optimize and customize the game.
  
# Multiplayer

### This build is perfectly designed to play on any servers.
- It has a voice chat - You could disable this if you prefer to.
- As well as some changes to the vanilla chat.

# Why download it?
It will be useful to you if you don't want to bother with building your modpack and just want to play alone or with friends.
